title: festuca pinnata var. sylvatica
intro: Festuca pinnata var. sylvatica, also known as mountain fescue, is a type of grass species in the family Poaceae. Traditionally, mountain fescue has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Mountain fescue can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
